meaning: n.<口>疲劳,劳累,轮胎,头饰vt.使疲倦,使厌烦,梳理vi.疲劳,厌倦
examples: The driver lost control when a tire burst.
People were beginning to tire in the midday heat.
He felt he would never tire of listening to her stories.
The massive glaciers, which looked like giant tire treads running through the mountains, reflected orange.
So do strange ones, like the Vigor poster that depicts a tiger with his fangs around a tire.
